title: Feedback - send a Suggestion feedback with names/email
scenario: Suggestion feedback with name and email is sent successfully from App Settings > Feedback section
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
4. Select the "Suggestion" option from the feedback type list.
5. Enter text for the feedback body.
6. Enter a name in the Name field.
7. Enter an email address in the Email field.
expected: The feedback is sent successfully with the name and email attached. A confirmation message appears indicating the feedback was submitted.
